Off Calendar Feb-14-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Ross, clerk-Beth Wilber,nothing on record, Dept. 525.
11:16am: Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Tara Condon, Esq. appears for Appellant Personality Hotels. Responent Aisha K. Hunte appears in Pro Per. Appearing as witnesses for the Appellant are Frank Okun, director of sales and David Issel, director of operations. Parties and witnesses were previously sworn. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative.
